evidence.validation: Audio stream format validation passes for supported formats (WAV, MP3, FLAC)
evidence.tenantPolicy: Tenant isolation enforced at service boundary
evidence.outputMetadata: Transcription confidence scores and language detection results
evidence.degradedBehavior: Fallback to default language when language detection fails with degraded confidence threshold

evidence.validation: Model selection based on audio characteristics and tenant configuration

evidence.degradedBehavior: Graceful degradation to base model when fine-tuned model unavailable

evidence.eventEmission: CDC events emitted for transcription lifecycle events
evidence.auditTrail: Audit events generated for all transcription operations
evidence.degradedBehavior: Queue-based persistence with retry on storage unavailability
